text.title: ADR Reversibility Tagging Output Contract
text.summary: Defines the ADR frontmatter additions and the review-gate routing schema.

forbidden.pattern: reversibility field missing — CI must reject
reversibility value not in the 4-tier enum (no custom values)
approval_record missing required_approvers OR signed before cool-off window expires
approval_record where author == approver on one_way_door_* (self-approval)

allowed-transformations.transformation: "partial_two_way" can be promoted to "two_way_door" if a refactor makes rollback cheaper than expected — document in superseding ADR.
Approval may be batch-signed for related two_way_door ADRs (linter rules, dev tooling) under a single PR.
For solo founders without a co-approver, "founder sign-off" rule on one-way-door becomes "wait 48h then sign self" — cool-off period replaces the second person.

section.title: Review-gate routing table
section.code: reversibility | approvers | cool-off | pre-mortem two_way_door | author | 0h | no partial_two_way | 1 peer | 0h | no one_way_door_costly | architect + PM | 24h | required one_way_door_irrevocable | founder + arch | 48h | required

list.item: reversibility field populated with one of 4 enum values
rollback_estimate populated with all 3 required keys
pre_mortem present for any one_way_door_* tag
approval_record matches the routing table for the tier
no self-approval on one-way-door tiers (unless solo founder with documented 48h wait)
